embed.title: !language
embed.description: Change the language the bot uses for responses and alert content.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}language` — show the current setting and list available languages
`{{prefix}}language en` — set to English
`{{prefix}}language de` — set to German
`{{prefix}}language zh-cn` — set to Simplified Chinese

Available languages depend on what the operator has enabled; `{{prefix}}language` with no argument lists them.

fields.name: What changes
fields.value:
- Pokemon, move, type, item, form, and team names in alerts
- Bot reply text (help, errors, confirmations)
- The command keywords themselves don't change — `{{prefix}}track` is always `{{prefix}}track`, regardless of your language setting.
